name: ncli
description: Agent skills for the ncli Nostr CLI — apply workflows, queries, relay ops, identity, and PoW mining.

plugins.name: ncli-apply
plugins.description: Author and run ncli apply workflow specs (kind: stream, sync, or inspect) that tail live events, sync via NIP-77 negentropy, or read-only query across relays/local stores.

plugins.name: ncli-query
plugins.description: Query and export Nostr events with ncli's dump and find commands — look up an event by ID or NIP-01 filter across relays/local event stores, or export matches to JSON.

plugins.name: ncli-relay-ops
plugins.description: Configure, run, and operate a live ncli Nostr relay — author relay.yaml, start the server, monitor/administer it remotely, rebuild search/zap indexes offline or online, and manage NIP-43 relay membership/invite-codes/roles.

plugins.name: ncli-identity
plugins.description: Generate, inspect, and manage Nostr keypairs with ncli's local vault, and mint NIP-26 delegation tokens for scripted or agent-driven signing.

plugins.name: ncli-miner
plugins.description: Mine or verify NIP-13 proof-of-work for a Nostr event with ncli's miner command (authored inline via --content/--content-file, or from an unsigned event YAML/JSON file, auto-signed when an identity's key is available), then publish the result to relays with ncli publish.
